title: India States and Capitals
description: A geography round focused on Indian states, capitals, union territories, and core map facts.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
questions.hint: It is known as the Pink City.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Gujarat?
questions.hint: It is a planned city named after Mahatma Gandhi.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Maharashtra?
questions.hint: It is also India's financial capital.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Karnataka?
questions.hint: It is known as India's Silicon Valley.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tamil Nadu?
questions.hint: It was formerly called Madras.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Kerala?
questions.hint: It starts with T and is on the southwest coast.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Telangana?
questions.hint: It is famous for Charminar.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of West Bengal?
questions.hint: It was the capital of British India before Delhi.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Odisha?
questions.hint: It is known for the Lingaraj Temple.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Bihar?
questions.hint: It lies on the banks of the Ganga.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Jharkhand?
questions.hint: It shares its first letter with Ranchi Trophy's namesake city.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Chhattisgarh?
questions.hint: It starts with R and is a growing central Indian city.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Madhya Pradesh?
questions.hint: It is famous for its lakes.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uttar Pradesh?
questions.hint: It is also known for its kebabs and tehzeeb.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uttarakhand?
questions.hint: It is a hill city and also a well-known school town.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Himachal Pradesh?
questions.hint: It was once the summer capital of British India.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Punjab?
questions.hint: It is a planned city shared with Haryana.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Haryana?
questions.hint: It shares its capital with Punjab.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Assam?
questions.hint: It is famous for the Kamakhya Temple.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Meghalaya?
questions.hint: It is known for heavy rainfall and hill scenery.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Arunachal Pradesh?
questions.hint: Its name begins with I.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Manipur?
questions.hint: It starts with I and is a valley city.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Mizoram?
questions.hint: It starts with A.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tripura?
questions.hint: It starts with A and is near Bangladesh.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Nagaland?
questions.hint: Its name begins with K.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Sikkim?
questions.hint: It starts with G and is a popular hill destination.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Goa?
questions.hint: It is also called Panaji.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of India?
questions.hint: It is home to Parliament and India Gate.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
questions.hint: It starts with P.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Lakshadweep?
questions.hint: It starts with K.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Puducherry?
questions.hint: It has the same name as the union territory.

questions.prompt: What is the winter capital of Jammu and Kashmir?
questions.hint: Its name starts with J.

questions.prompt: What is the summer capital of Jammu and Kashmir?
questions.hint: It is famous for Dal Lake.

questions.prompt: Which city serves as the headquarters of the Union Territory of Ladakh?
questions.hint: It is a high-altitude city beginning with L.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of the Union Territory of Chandigarh?
questions.hint: It has the same name as the territory.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of the Union Territory of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu?
questions.hint: It is one of the two names in the union territory title.

questions.prompt: Which is the largest state in India by area?
questions.hint: It is home to the Thar Desert.

questions.prompt: Which is the smallest state in India by area?
questions.hint: It is a famous beach destination.

questions.prompt: Which Indian state has the longest coastline?
questions.hint: Its capital is Gandhinagar.

questions.prompt: Which Indian state is known as the Land of Five Rivers?
questions.hint: Its capital is Chandigarh.

questions.prompt: Which Indian state is the tea-garden state of the northeast and home to Kaziranga?
questions.hint: Its capital is Dispur.

questions.prompt: Which Indian state is called God's Own Country?
questions.hint: Its capital is Thiruvananthapuram.

questions.prompt: Which state is home to the city of Jodhpur?
questions.hint: Its capital is Jaipur.

questions.prompt: Which state is home to the city of Mysuru?
questions.hint: Its capital is Bengaluru.

questions.prompt: Which Indian river is often called the lifeline of Madhya Pradesh and Gujarat?
questions.hint: It flows west into the Arabian Sea.

questions.prompt: Which plateau covers much of peninsular India?
questions.hint: Its name starts with D.

questions.prompt: Which mountain range runs along the western edge of peninsular India?
questions.hint: It is also called Sahyadri.

questions.prompt: Which sea lies to the west of India?
questions.hint: Mumbai is on its coast.

questions.prompt: Which bay lies to the east of India?
questions.hint: Chennai is on its coast.

questions.prompt: Which is the longest river flowing entirely within India?
questions.hint: It rises in Maharashtra and flows east.
